channel.title: Plans on Ruiqi Ding
channel.description: Recent content in Plans on Ruiqi Ding

item.title: PhD
item.description: Application materials transcripts Personal statement: maximum 400-500 words, concise Your background: what’s brought you to choose a PhD, NOT your life story Why PhD: motivation Academic experience: comment on your CV, explain the significance of those qualifications for your PhD application Extra-curricular experience: experience that has also demonstrated (or developed) relevant skills for your PhD, such as organisation, independent project management, self-motivation, etc.
